import { expect, expectTypeOf, test } from "vitest"; import * as z from "zod/v4"; const schema = z.nan(); test("passing validations", () => { schema.parse(Number.NaN); schema.parse(Number("Not a number")); expectTypeOf<typeof schema._output>().toEqualTypeOf<number>(); }); test("failing validations", () => { expect(() => schema.parse(5)).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse("John")).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse(true)).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse(null)).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse(undefined)).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse({})).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse([])).toThrow(); });
